Cry Wolf (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $10,047,674Details
International Box Office $5,895,407
Worldwide Box Office $15,943,081
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,428,209 (44.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.27 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:63.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$1,000,000 (worldwide box office is 15.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,789 opening theaters/1,789 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $18,747,300

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 16th, 2005 (Wide) by Focus/Rogue Pictures
Video Release: December 20th, 2005 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, terror, disturbing images, language, sexuality and a brief drug reference.
Running Time: 90 minutes
Plot point: Infidelity, Prank Gone Wrong, Relationships Gone Wrong, Revenge, Surprise Twist
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
